title: Sandokan contro il leopardo di Sarawak
writer: Luigi Capuano, Arpad DeRiso, Emilio Salgari
actors: Ray Danton, Guy Madison, Franca Bettoia
plot: Samoa is kidnapped and held captive hypnotized in caves by her cousin Charles Druk, whose father has been murdered by her future husband Sandokan, lord of Malaya. Assisted by his European friend Iannis, he wants to rescue her.
